_comment: At the Introduced->Assigned lifecycle transition the mock picks ONE name at random from `radiologists` and emits it verbatim as the study's assigned_radiologist (-> exam.assigned_to in the notification system). Narrowed to exactly the THREE roster rads (test_radiologist_1, test_radiologist_2, test_radiologist_3) -- auto-assignment picks randomly among these three, and the notification system routes the SMS to whichever one's per-rad number (all three are valid keys in notification_targets.yaml). To pin auto-assignment deterministically to one rad, set `radiologists` to just ["test_radiologist_1"] (or _2). To restore the original realistic 10-name pool, use `_disabled_realistic_pool`. Reassign across the two at any time via PUT /studies/{acc}/assignee. Pool files are hot-reloaded; no restart needed.
